text: Which is a non-accumulator of charges?

options.text: Toluene is a Non-accumulator of charges
Cyclohexane is a Non-accumulator of charges
Alcohols is an Accumulator of charges
Kotones is a Non-accumulator of charges

explanation: Ketones are classified as non-accumulators of static charge because they possess sufficient conductivity to dissipate charge build-up during cargo transfer. Toluene and cyclohexane are hydrocarbons with low conductivity (accumulators), while alcohols are generally polar but often treated differently; ketones are the standard example of a non-accumulator in this context.
